identity.role: S3 triality annealing with a tight 3-swap convergence bound

pattern: complete-unformalized work -> formalization in paper-bound space -> Forge

source_work.state_before: complete <=3-round scheduler (annealing engine, D4 chart8 atlas, scheduler, consensus protocol, gRPC/REST); never formalized, no forge, repo fourpack copy was docs/metadata only

adjudicated_divergence: source docstring claimed (1,1,0) requires exactly 3 swaps as the tightness witness; exhaustive verification shows (1,1,0) converges in 2 and the tight states are (0,1,1) and (1,0,0); the max-3 bound itself is correct
gRPC/REST/consensus/cluster layers stay product-side; only the proven annealing core enters the forge ring
validated_claims: The Lie-conjugate basin is exactly the four L=R states {000, 010, 101, 111}.
Each of the three transpositions is an involution on all 8 states.
The three transpositions generate all of S3 (order 6).
Every state in {0,1}^3 converges to a Lie conjugate within 3 swaps under the fixed sequence (LR, LC, CR) — exhaustive.
The bound is tight: exactly (0,1,1) and (1,0,0) require 3 swaps.
Conjugate states anneal in zero steps, unchanged.
Recorded trajectories replay deterministically, one transposition per step.
Circle classes F = {010, 111} and P = {000, 101} partition the basin disjointly.
The load-triple scheduler balances unbalanced triples in <= 3 reassignments and leaves balanced triples untouched.
honesty_boundary: Multi-node scheduling safety/liveness under real capacity constraints is NOT claimed; the D4 chart8 cluster atlas needs its own bijectivity receipt before promotion.
open_obligations: Bijectivity receipt for the D4 chart8 cluster atlas, then promote it (likely into the same forge).
Promote scheduler/consensus as adapters depending on the forge core.
Remaining fourpack candidate through the same pattern: product_authentica (src exists: core/lattice.py, core/security.py, voa/encoder.py, tests).
notes: Fourth instance of the promotion pattern (PaneForge-Workspace-Tool, EntropyForge, SentinelForge, ConvergeForge). Paper 03 binding: S3 is the triality group permuting the (L,C,R) lanes; the conjugate basin is the triality-mirror fixed-point set.
